# Brownfield Governance Gap Report
*Generated by scripts/audit.py — Flynn Data Services*

---

## Summary Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Roles | 30 |
| Users | 4 |
| Warehouses | 4 |
| Unmonitored warehouses | 4 |
| Tagged objects | 0 |

---

## Critical Findings
*(Must be addressed before any other work proceeds)*

| Finding | Evidence | Risk | Remediation |
|---------|----------|------|-------------|
| Break-glass / dormant role(s) assigned to users | BREAK_GLASS_TEMP→USER_BF_TEST; FIREFIGHTER→USER_BF_TEST | Emergency roles must have zero user assignments outside active incidents (PHILOSOPHY.md §4) | Revoke all assignments immediately. Document any active incident. Add daily assertion to eval suite. |
| ACCOUNTADMIN assigned to users AND used for routine queries | 1 user(s) actively running SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE as ACCOUNTADMIN: KENFLYNN | ACCOUNTADMIN is being used as a daily-driver role, not reserved for emergencies (PHILOSOPHY.md §4) | Identify required privileges; create scoped roles; revoke ACCOUNTADMIN |
| Warehouses without resource monitors | 4 unmonitored warehouse(s): SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_WH, SYSTEM$STREAMLIT_NOTEBOOK_WH, WH_BROWNFIELD_UNMONITORED, WH_INGEST | Uncontrolled cost exposure — no spend ceiling | Attach a resource monitor to every warehouse (SPEC.md §3 — Resource Monitor Defaults) |
| ACCOUNTADMIN used for routine operational queries | 71 SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE queries in last 90 days | ACCOUNTADMIN is being used as a workaround, not for emergency intervention only (PHILOSOPHY.md §4) | Identify the actual privilege needed; create a scoped role; remove ACCOUNTADMIN usage |

---

## Standard Findings
*(Should be addressed as part of the migration)*

| Finding | Evidence | Priority | Remediation |
|---------|----------|----------|-------------|
| Ad-hoc role names detected | 6 roles without standard naming: BI_DEVELOPER, DATA_ANALYST, DATA_ENGINEER, DATA_SCIENTIST, LEGACY_LOADER, SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE | medium | Map each role to a connector or functional role pattern and migrate |
| ACCOUNTADMIN assigned but not used for routine queries | 1 user(s) hold ACCOUNTADMIN with no operational query activity: USER_BF_TEST | medium | Revoke ACCOUNTADMIN; grant FIREFIGHTER for break-glass access instead (PHILOSOPHY.md §4) |
| No tag coverage detected | Zero tagged objects found in account_usage.tag_references | low | Define tag taxonomy in tags.yaml and apply at Walk stage |
| Service accounts using multiple roles detected | Multiple role usage by: KENFLYNN | medium | Each service account should use exactly one connector role (PHILOSOPHY.md §1) |

---

## Next Steps

1. Review findings above with the client (see docs/brownfield_intake.md Part 2)
2. Run the intake interview: `uv run scripts/intake_interview.py --brownfield`
3. Review and finalize `intake/connectors.yaml` and `intake/decisions.md`
4. Run codegen: `uv run scripts/generate_tf.py`
5. Review `terraform/*.auto.tfvars.json` and apply
